name: auth-workspace
description: Root task runner for auth multi-project repository

scripts.help: node -e "console.log(['Available scripts:','  npm run dev:web','  npm run dev:api','  npm run dev:desktop:macos','  npm run dev:mobile:android','  npm run build:web','  npm run build:api','  npm run build:desktop:macos','  npm run build:mobile:android:release','  npm run dev:demo:oauth','  npm run dev:demo:oidc','  npm run dev:demo:sspu','  npm run dev:core','  npm run build:core'].join('\n'))"
scripts.dev:core: node -e "const {spawn}=require('node:child_process'); const ps=[]; const start=(name,cmd,args,opts={})=>{const p=spawn(cmd,args,{stdio:'inherit',shell:true,...opts}); p.on('exit',(code,signal)=>{if(signal||code){for(const x of ps){if(x!==p&&!x.killed)x.kill('SIGTERM');} process.exitCode=code||1;}}); ps.push(p);}; start('api','./gradlew',['bootRun'],{cwd:'api',env:{...process.env,KSUSER_ENV:'development'}}); start('web','npm',['--prefix','web','run','dev']); ['SIGINT','SIGTERM'].forEach(s=>process.on(s,()=>{for(const p of ps){if(!p.killed)p.kill('SIGTERM');} process.exit(130);}));"
scripts.build:core: npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.dev:desktop:macos: cd desktop && flutter pub get && flutter run -d macos
scripts.dev:desktop:windows: cd desktop && flutter pub get && flutter run -d windows
scripts.build:desktop:macos: cd desktop && flutter pub get && flutter build macos --release
scripts.build:desktop:windows: cd desktop && flutter pub get && flutter build windows --release
